name: app-card-components
description: Card layouts for catalog browsing: square grid (AppCard), horizontal row (AppRowCard), landscape banner (AppLandscapeCard), big hero (HeroCard), plus the Install button.
postInstall: 2. The detail page paths assume /app/[slug] for type=apps and /game/[slug] for type=games — adjust detailHref() if your routes differ
3. The asset URLs assume asset-serving-with-auth is installed at /api/asset/...
4. The Install button assumes file-download-with-logging is at /api/download/...
